Streaming Platform Tools

Platform-specific tools and extensions to enhance your streaming experience.

Discord

#1 Community App

Discord gives you a hub where your community can hang out, bond and play games together.

Visit Website →

Open Broadcast Software

#1 Broadcast Tool

Free and open source software for video recording and live streaming. Works on most operating systems, and streaming platforms.

Visit Website →

OWN3D

#1 Graphics & Overlays

A massive collection of graphics, overlays, alerts, emotes, music and more. The perfect companion to improve your branding and appearance.

Visit Website →

Pretzel

#1 Music Option

The world’s largest catalog of DMCA-safe music for all your streaming and downloading needs.

Visit Website →

Starforge Systems

#1 Gaming PC

Starforge Systems builds custom gaming PCs, supported by industry experts. Each PC is benchmarked and QC'd to ensure it lives up to your high standards.

Visit Website →

Streams Charts

#1 Analytics Tool

Get insights into the streaming market for virtually all channels, streams, and games on the most popular broadcasting platforms.

Visit Website →

Fairly Odd Streamers is a resource hub for livestreamers with curated sponsorships, tools, and insights.
